# Copilot Instructions

- Write code comments in English only.
- Do not use useless debug commands.
- You may only verify the build with `cmake --build .`.
- Any other commands must be run only when explicitly instructed.
- Implementations of all classes that are logical/domain objects (not DTOs) must be placed in the corresponding `.cpp` file.
- If a method is empty and its contract is clearly wrong (for example it returns `void` but must return data), fix the method signature and implementation immediately.
- Do not leave half-solutions that keep a broken contract just to avoid refactoring.
- When fixing a broken contract, update declarations, implementations, and call sites in the same change.
